narrative.title: Gene Therapy
narrative.headline: Gene therapy advances
narrative.summary: Recent studies focus on genetic engineering and gene transfer techniques
narrative.brief: Researchers explore new methods for gene therapy, including ex vivo mRNA-based gene transfer and genetic engineering of bioagents. These developments aim to improve disease control and cancer immunotherapy
narrative.forecast: Watch for further advancements in gene therapy trials and their potential applications

sources.label: arXiv: Memory-Driven Self-Propulsion and Flocking of Chemically Active Droplets
arXiv: Fundamental Relation between Conductance of Biomolecules and the Fukui Function
arXiv: Learning Mechanistic Reasoning for Chemical Reactions with Large Language Models

narrative.title: Biochemistry Decline
narrative.headline: Enzyme library enables selective hydroxylation
narrative.summary: Recent studies focus on biocatalytic strategies and enzyme libraries for steroid synthesis and natural product development
narrative.brief: Researchers are exploring biocatalytic approaches for steroid synthesis and natural product development, while also investigating post-transcriptional regulation in stochastic gene expression models. The use of enzyme libraries is being applied to enable selective hydroxylation of complex substrates
narrative.forecast: Watch for further developments in biocatalytic strategies and enzyme library applications in biochemistry
